subject: EU Law
module: Free Movement of Services and Freedom of Establishment

lessons.title: Freedom of Establishment — Article 49 TFEU
lessons.description: Freedom of establishment is closely connected to free movement of services, and the boundary between the two has been the subject of considerable case law.

lessons.title: Free Movement of Services — Article 56 TFEU and the Services Directive
lessons.description: Lesson Two — the final lesson in this EU Law module series. Today we examine the free movement of services under Article 56 TFEU and the Services Directive 2006/123/EC.
